principles: Keep raw text and cleaned text in parallel.
Only delete layout noise or recoverable OCR artifacts automatically.
Route ambiguous edits to review instead of guessing.
Protected spans must survive cleaning unless the review agent explicitly approves removal.

must_do: Extract page text, token positions, confidence hints, and page order.
Keep page anchors so every cleaned span can map back to the source page.
Apply must_clean rules automatically with edit logs.
Honor protected spans before any deletion or merge.
must_not_do: Drop citations, footnotes, or numbering blindly

must_do: Check ambiguous edits against the source image and OCR text.
Reject edits that remove real Russian lexical hyphens, abbreviations, numbering, or factual values.
must_not_do: Change the document meaning while fixing OCR artifacts

must_clean.description: Remove discretionary soft hyphen characters inserted by OCR or PDF extraction.
Strip zero-width and other invisible formatting characters.
Rejoin words that were broken by line-wrap hyphenation across lines.
Merge line breaks inside the same paragraph when the next line is not a true heading, list item, or table row.
heuristics: Current line does not end with sentence-final punctuation.
Next line starts with lowercase Cyrillic.

must_clean.description: Remove page headers, footers, and page numbers repeated across multiple pages with near-identical text.
Collapse duplicate spaces and normalize spacing around punctuation.
Normalize dash, quote, and ellipsis variants to one project standard.
Delete isolated punctuation or symbol runs that carry no lexical meaning and recur as scanner noise.

conditional_clean.description: Footnote callouts may be removed for plain-body corpora, but must be reviewed first.
Footnote bodies often contain real content; separate before deletion.
Bracket citations and author-year references are removable only for target tasks that do not require source tracking.
Table-of-contents pages, leaders, and index fragments can be removed for正文语料 but should not be dropped blindly.
Figure captions, table notes, and formula numbers may be noise or real data depending on downstream use.
Watermarks, library stamps, and marginal notes require review before deletion.
Unify ё/e only for search and matching layers, not for archival output.
Correct OCR confusions such as A/А, C/С, P/Р only after token-level validation.
Lowercasing is acceptable for retrieval layers, but should not overwrite the preserved clean reading copy.
Normalize separators and spaces in numbers and dates only when the original value remains recoverable.

protected_keep.description: Do not delete true Russian lexical hyphens inside words or names.
Do not drop dots in standard Russian abbreviations.
Preserve initials with surnames and initials-only name references.
Preserve legal citations, article references, section markers, and list numbering.
Keep №, %, currencies, units, temperatures, and date separators.
Keep true Latin strings such as URLs, emails, part numbers, and institutional abbreviations.
Do not merge lines blindly inside poems, tables, addresses, or parallel-text layouts.
